violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as milk/juice) in the retail refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream chest freezer has an accumulation of dust, dirt, and ice. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026
